overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traversing a mountainous forest environment. The character transitions from walking to running along dirt paths through dense woodland, passing rock formations and emerging to an open lakeside vista with snow-capped peaks in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path passing a large rock formation and ancient tree with exposed roots

entered.detail: massive gray boulder formation beside the path with mossy surfaces
large deciduous tree with thick trunk and exposed root system
towering snow-covered peaks visible through the forest canopy
dense coniferous trees surrounding the path on both sides

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense forest area with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. A prominent snow-capped mountain range dominates the distant view while the path winds past a large mossy rock outcropping and an ancient tree with gnarled roots.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path surrounded by tall pine trees

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the pine forest where the canopy creates shaded, diffused lighting conditions. The path narrows as it winds through dense coniferous woodland with the snow-capped mountains now visible to the left.

events.description: emerging from dense forest cover into open grassy hillside terrain
character accelerates from walking pace to running

agents.ego_description: running along the open hillside path with increased speed

entered.detail: open terrain with green grass and scattered wildflowers
tall bare tree trunk without leaves standing on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Breaking out of the forest into an expansive grassy hillside bathed in direct sunlight. The terrain opens up to reveal wider mountain vistas as the character transitions to running along the winding dirt path past a distinctive dead tree snag.

events.description: approaching mountain lake with sun visible over distant peaks

agents.ego_description: running toward scenic lake with mountain backdrop and sun glare

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the sky and surrounding mountains
dense tree line across the lake on the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: Approaching a serene mountain lake with the sun shining over distant snow-capped peaks creating a backlit atmosphere. The path runs along the water's edge through open terrain with panoramic views of the lake and surrounding forested mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, shaded forest that gradually opens into a sunlit lakeside vista. It begins on a winding path under a canopy of dappled sunlight, passing a mossy rock outcropping and a gnarled ancient tree with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the camera moves deeper into the pine forest, the lighting becomes diffused and shaded while the path narrows through thick coniferous woodland. The scene then breaks out of the trees onto an expansive, sun-drenched grassy hillside, where the character transitions to a run past a dead tree snag as the mountain vistas widen. Finally, the terrain opens completely to reveal a serene mountain lake, with the path running along the water's edge under a backlit sky and panoramic views of the surrounding peaks.
